name: Marc Liebman
description: Founder of The Product Operator. 25 years of product leadership across founder-led startups, growth-stage companies, and PE-backed B2B SaaS. 30+ due diligence engagements across private equity firms including Advent International, Thoma Bravo, Blackstone, and Genstar Capital. Former Global SVP of Product at Amadeus Hospitality. Led product diligence across two PE-led exits, including the sale of TravelClick to Thoma Bravo.
